---
name: Roadmap Awareness
description: Use when auditing feature status, deciding what is missing, or implementing items from the roadmap and status files.
---
# Roadmap Awareness

- Use [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md), [README.md](README.md), and current code together. The roadmap can lag behind implementation.
- For status checks, distinguish between `done`, `partial`, `not wired`, and `unknown` rather than collapsing everything into `done` or `missing`.
- When implementing a roadmap item, identify the exact integration point that is missing and patch that path first.
